notes: Ski Utah official member page reports 11 runs with 36% beginner / 45% intermediate / 18% advanced (no expert tier). 60+ skiable acres, 349 ft vertical. Sums to 99% due to rounding. Skiresort.info had only 0.5 km slopes listed, not usable. OnTheSnow page 404'd.

Skiresort.info reports 80 km slopes: easy 30km (37%), intermediate 30km (37%), difficult 20km (26%) — but in km not run count. Discovering Montana / club summary reports '60+ runs' with 15% beginner / 55% intermediate / 30% expert. No separate advanced/expert split available. Numbers conflict so trails_total left null.
